ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the product */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit of the product */,
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the length of the product */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fabric composition of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "parent_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent product (for variations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_length_id FOREIGN KEY ("length_id") REFERENCES lengths ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fit_id") REFERENCES fits ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fabric_id FOREIGN KEY ("fabric_id") REFERENCES fabrics ("fabric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_parent_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the product line */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the product line was launched */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the style */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the style icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fits" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit */,
  "fit_name" TEXT /* Name of the fit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fit */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the fit */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the fit icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length */,
  "length_name" TEXT /* Name of the length */,
  "inside_leg_length_cm" REAL /* Inside leg length in centimeters */,
  "inside_leg_length_inch" REAL /* Inside leg length in inches */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabrics" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fabric */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the fabric, including the percentage of each material */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the fabric */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions specific to the fabric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for measurements */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the size */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the size icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style the size chart is for */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit the size chart is for */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_inch" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "ankle_cm" REAL /* Ankle measurement in centimeters */,
  "ankle_inch" REAL /* Ankle measurement in inches */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the size chart */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be placed */,
  "last_reordered_date" TEXT /* Last date when the product size was reordered */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the location manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the location manager */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_locations" (
  "product_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-location association */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product size */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size available at the location */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be placed */,
  "last_reordered_date" TEXT /* Last date when the product size was reordered */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the product size at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_locations_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date when the user logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product size */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
